features.title: API Service Skeleton
features.description: Initialize FastAPI, routes, and health check.
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Created module-local `chatbot/.venv` and installed `chatbot/requirements.txt` there after sandbox network restrictions required escalation. Added missing `chatbot/.env.example` so SETUP.md is reproducible. Verified with `cd chatbot && USE_MOCK=true .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (17 passed) and mock-first E2E `/api/health` returned HTTP 200 with lora, rag, and ner module statuses.

features.title: LLM-based NER Implementation
features.description: Implement the current NER backend and routing layer.
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Existing NER service verified in mock mode by `cd chatbot && USE_MOCK=true .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (17 passed). Test coverage confirms Bitcoin/BTC and Ethereum/ETH detection, CRYPTO entity typing, confidence range, and empty-string behavior.
verification: Entity extraction returns expected crypto entities

features.title: Conversation Generation Pipeline
features.description: Implement the chat pipeline with mocks first.
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Mock chat pipeline verified with `cd chatbot && USE_MOCK=true .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (17 passed), including response fields, conversation_id preservation, generated conversation_id, multi-turn isolation, empty message rejection, and mock latency < 3 seconds. Mock-first E2E `/api/chat` returned reply, sentiment, entities, sources, and conversation_id.
verification: POST /api/chat returns HTTP 200 in mock mode

features.title: Sentiment Trend Summary
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Sentiment summary endpoint verified through the module tests and mock-first E2E. `curl -sS -m 8 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/sentiment/summary?crypto=BTC&period=7d'` returned HTTP 200 with crypto=BTC, period=7d, top_topics, data_points_analyzed, and seven trend rows.

features.title: Integration with Real LoRA and RAG
features.description: Switch Chatbot to real provider calls.
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Mock-first end-to-end path is verified, and RAG has real Milvus/BGE module-level evidence. 2026-04-28 update: Chatbot now supports `RAG_USE_MOCK=true` isolation and can call the verified AutoDL OpenAI-compatible LoRA service with `USE_MOCK=false LLM_BACKEND=lora LORA_USE_MOCK=false`. Verified `/api/chat` returned an AutoDL LoRA reply, Bullish sentiment from `sentiment-lora`, fallback BTC entity extraction, and mock RAG sources. 2026-04-28 full no-mock preparation: RAG package imports were made compatible with `from rag.src.retrieval import ...` inside the Chatbot process, `/api/health` now probes the configured Milvus collection instead of returning a fixed document count, and `scripts/verify_full_no_mock_e2e.py` was added. Full all-real provider integration remains in progress until the AutoDL tunnel is reachable and the same Chatbot run passes the full no-mock E2E script.
verification: python scripts/verify_full_no_mock_e2e.py passes while Frontend and Chatbot are running
